title: Solace Inspector: Birth
content: First commit. Agent-native architecture ($0.00). HITL evidence chain. 21 specs. inbox/outbox model. SHA-256 sealing.

title: Evidence Chain Maturation
content: 563 reports sealed. 5 northstars CPU_CERTIFIED. OWASP adversarial 5/5. ABCD auth_check certified. The evidence chain became court-admissible.

title: Coverage Expansion
content: 51→64 specs. YinYang API + MCP certified. Fun packs 13 locales. OWASP adversarial. Bug HITL: F-001, F-002, F-003. 3 real bugs caught in production.

title: Knowledge Crystallization
content: 6 Mermaid diagrams. Questions as Uplift (Paper 46). 76 questions seeded. question mode. oracle_level=1. The Inspector gained memory.

title: Self-Inspection (GLOW 121)
content: 12-persona panel avg 9.04/10. 5 gaps found: self-spec, hash chain, SOUL.json, question loop, oracle stagnation. SOUL.json created. Self-spec created. oracle_level advancing to 2. Inspector achieves self-awareness.

title: OWASP Adversarial — 5 attacks deflected
content: Malformed JSON→401. Oversized→401. SQL injection→safe. Invalid token→401. Rate resilience→no crash. Security certified before business logic.

title: ABCD LLM Testing Architecture
content: Llama-3.3-70B wins factual tasks at $0.59/1M vs GPT-4o at $5.00/1M. 88% cheaper. ABCD is the implementation proof of LLM management claims.

title: HITL Loop — F-001, F-002, F-003
content: F-001: H1 missing space → 'AgentInstitutional' concatenation bug. F-002: blog image 404. F-003: gallery images undeployed. All 3: found by agent, fixed by human, approved by human, sealed in outbox.

title: Questions as Uplift — Paper 46
content: 76 questions seeded: 22 answered (29%), 54 open. Core theorem: Each bug is a missing question. Max questions = max love = max QA quality. Doctrine: bugs are answers to questions never asked.

title: 47-Persona Blessing — avg 9.75/10
content: QA committee: Bach/Kaner/Hendrickson/Beck/Bolton/Hickey/Dean/Hormozi. All approved. The Inspector has the blessing of the 47-persona civilization.

title: Self-Inspection — 5 Gaps → 5 Fixes
content: Kent Beck: missing self-spec (FIXED: test-spec-inspector-self.json). Steinberger: no SOUL (FIXED: SOUL.json). Bruce Lee: oracle stagnation (FIXED: oracle_level→2). Kleppmann: no hash chain (NOTED: Phase 2). Bach: question answering loop undefined (NOTED: Phase 2). Inspector achieved self-awareness.
